rankings.name: No Drama This End
key_positive_factors: Unbeaten 3-3 over hurdles including the Grade 1 Challow
Highest RPR in the field (156)
Leading British-based hope according to spotlight
Top-tier Nicholls/Cobden partnership
key_risks: High market expectation (5/2)
First appearance at the Cheltenham Festival

rankings.name: Ballyfad (IRE)
key_positive_factors: Elite form (1112) including a narrow 2nd in a Grade 1 over 2m
Pedigree suggests the step up to 2m5f will be ideal
Gordon Elliott yard and Jack Kennedy booking
key_risks: Needs to prove he can reverse Leopardstown form with King Rasko Grey over a new trip

rankings.name: King Rasko Grey
key_positive_factors: Paul Townend's choice from six Willie Mullins entries
Excellent 3rd in a Grade 1 last time, just behind Ballyfad
Strong course suitability expected
key_risks: Often finds one or two too good at the highest level

rankings.name: Skylight Hustle
key_positive_factors: Upward trajectory with G1 victory at Leopardstown in December
Second-highest RPR (153) in the field
Shows a 'sprinkling of stardust' in his wins
key_risks: Lucky to be left clear in his G1 win
Pedigree asks small questions regarding the 2m5f distance

rankings.name: Act Of Innocence (IRE)
key_positive_factors: Impressed when winning a Huntingdon Listed event (2m4f)
Follows the Shishkin path for the Henderson yard
Progressive RPR profile reaching 146
key_risks: Beaten at short odds on good ground earlier in the season
Lacks the G1 experience of some rivals

rankings.name: I'll Sort That
key_positive_factors: Unbeaten 4-4 since returning to hurdles
Admirable gritty attitude shown in Naas Grade 1 win
Proven stamina at 2m4f
key_risks: Tactical front-runner who will find it harder to dominate this field

rankings.name: Bossman Jack
key_positive_factors: On the up after easily defying a penalty at Chepstow
Representing last year's winning trainer (Dan Skelton)
Solid RPR of 149 indicates he is close to the top tier
key_risks: Officially rated 134, which is light for this grade

rankings.name: Sober
key_positive_factors: Unbeaten 2-2 over hurdles and Group class on the flat
Won a Grade 2 Punchestown event comfortably despite market drift
Extreme latent ability if hurdling technique improves
key_risks: Novice errors in jumping could be punished at this level

rankings.name: Sortudo
key_positive_factors: Runner-up in Naas G1 last time
Proven at the trip and handles the ground
key_risks: Second string for the Mullins yard

rankings.name: Zeus Power
key_positive_factors: Highly progressive winning his last two starts at Navan and Thurles
RPR of 145 suggests he is better than his 100/1 odds
key_risks: Significant step up in class

rankings.name: Shuttle Diplomacy
key_positive_factors: Good Champion Bumper form (3rd)
Resurgent since being fitted with a tongue-tie
key_risks: Inconsistent profile since moving to hurdles

rankings.name: Hurricane Pat
key_positive_factors: Winning hurdle debut and Listed winner at Sandown
Solid RPR of 144
key_risks: Limitations seemed exposed when put in place at Haydock

rankings.name: Klimt Madrik
key_positive_factors: Fine 2nd to No Drama This End in the Challow
Chasing type with a very good attitude
key_risks: Statistically needs a big career best to win

rankings.name: Taurus Bay
key_positive_factors: Narrowly denied in a Grade 2 over C&D in January
Plucky attitude and proven stamina
key_risks: OR 135 leaves him with plenty to find

rankings.name: Saint Baco
key_positive_factors: Stable debut winner at Navan in December
key_risks: Disappointing and weak at Naas last time; Paul Townend jumps ship

rankings.name: Riskaway
key_positive_factors: Consistent performer in Irish novice hurdles
key_risks: Form consistently falling short of top G1 standard

rankings.name: Walks In June
key_positive_factors: Recent Leopardstown handicap winner
key_risks: Stepping up from handicap company into a warm G1

rankings.name: Free Spirit
key_positive_factors: Interesting profile from France
key_risks: Well beaten by Sober on stable debut

rankings.name: Fortune Timmy
key_positive_factors: Third in G2 here last time
key_risks: Form leaves him with a significant amount to find

rankings.name: Baron Noir
key_positive_factors: Yard depth
key_risks: Lack of data and high early odds suggest no confidence

rankings.name: Came From Nowhere
key_positive_factors: Paul Nicholls yard
key_risks: Appears to be a supplementary entry with little form proof

forecast_top_3.combination: No Drama This End > Skylight Hustle

tricast_top_3.combination: No Drama This End > Ballyfad > Skylight Hustle
No Drama This End > Skylight Hustle > Ballyfad
Ballyfad > No Drama This End > Skylight Hustle

pace_analysis.insight: A high-tempo stamina test favors the unbeaten Challow winner, potentially drawing the sting out of the Irish closers.

market_comparison.adjustment_reason: No late intelligence provided; sticking to ratings. Significant value identified against 4/1 market price.

No late intelligence provided. Highest divergence in field; market price (20/1) significantly underestimates model assessment.
